arts.ttl: Arsenal learn Watkins injury update amid transfer call as Cunha contract agreed
arts.sum: With all that being said, football.london has taken a look at the latest Arsenal January transfer news and rumours. With deadline day for the January window approaching, Mikel Arteta will need to work quickly in order to get new signings into Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Defender deal confirmed as Gunners weigh up pair of attacking targets
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal are running out of time to add to their squad for the remainder of the season but there is still time for the Gunners to get some business done

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Arsenal vs Man City in the Premier League on Sunday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's huge Arsenal transfer plan after quiet January window
arts.sum: Arsenal have lined up a deal for Real Sociedad’s Martin Zubimendi with both Thomas Partey and Jorginho potential exits this summer and they want to strengthen other departments

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Manchester City: Best bets for all Sunday’s Premier League games
arts.sum: Our betting expert with tips for Emirates, Manchester United, Tottenham and Champions League PLUS a Milan derby punt

arts.ttl: Man City discussing £30m fee for Porto midfielder as Pep Guardiola's side look to continue adding to their squad in bid to save their season
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Manchester City are discussing a fee of around £30million for a Porto midfielder. The player has a release clause of £50million. .

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man United suffer fatal transfer blow as £41.8m attacker signs long-term contract
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers confirm that Arsenal and Manchester United-linked attacker Matheus Cunha has signed a new contract until the summer of 2029.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals Sergio Busquets snubbed chance to replace Rodri
arts.sum: Manchester City have been busy in the transfer market this winter but Pep Guardiola admitted he had no chance of securing a deal for his former ally Sergio Busquets amid Rodri's injury

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola understands Erling Haaland’s reaction at end of last Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Haaland threw the ball at Gabriel’s head and there were further angry scenes after the final whistle.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta defends right to ‘respectful’ criticism of referees
arts.sum: The Gunners have been accused of “inflaming the situation” when it comes to certain refereeing decisions by pundit Gary Neville.
